summary: Verified all 3 requested features: 1) Courses tab now shows add-course page with empty filter start, 2) Teacher workload report with empty filter, month buttons (This Month, Previous Month, Two Months Ago), and Clear Filters, 3) Pagination (10/page) on both pages. All 9 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' - minor React Native warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Courses tab (/courses) correctly imports and renders AddCourseScreen component
✓ Courses page filter starts EMPTY - shows message 'اختر قسم أو ابحث لعرض المقررات'
✓ Clicking department filter shows courses for that department (tested with الشريعة والقانون)
✓ Search by name/code works correctly (tested with 'عقيدة')
✓ Courses pagination shows max 10 courses per page with prev/next controls (PAGE_SIZE=10)
✓ Teacher workload report filter starts EMPTY - shows message 'اختر فترة أو قسم أو معلم لعرض النصاب'
✓ 'هذا الشهر' (This Month) button sets date range for current month (04/01/2026 - 04/30/2026)
✓ 'الشهر السابق' (Previous Month) button sets date range for last month (03/01/2026 - 03/31/2026)
✓ 'الشهر الأسبق' (Two Months Ago) button sets date range for 2 months ago (02/01/2026 - 02/28/2026)
✓ Custom date range inputs work correctly
✓ 'مسح الفلاتر' (Clear Filters) button resets all filters and hides data
✓ Backend API GET /api/reports/teacher-workload with date params returns teacher data correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (7 courses, 4 departments, 3 teachers)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 requested features are working correctly: 1) Courses tab shows add-course page with empty filter, 2) Teacher workload report with empty filter and month buttons, 3) Clear filters button. Database has 7 courses across 4 departments and 3 teachers. Test credentials: admin/admin123.

tests: Courses tab (/courses) renders AddCourseScreen component
Empty filter message 'اختر قسم أو ابحث لعرض المقررات' displayed on load
Department filter buttons visible (الشريعة والقانون, الدراسات الإسلامية, قسم اختبار 180155, عقيدة)
Clicking department filter shows courses for that department
Search input works - filters courses by name/code
Pagination controls visible when >10 courses
Course cards show: name, code, department, level, section, teacher, student count, lecture count
Empty filter message 'اختر فترة أو قسم أو معلم لعرض النصاب' displayed on load
Filter buttons: هذا الأسبوع, هذا الشهر, الشهر السابق, الشهر الأسبق
This Month button sets correct date range (04/01/2026 - 04/30/2026)
Previous Month button sets correct date range (03/01/2026 - 03/31/2026)
Two Months Ago button sets correct date range (02/01/2026 - 02/28/2026)
Custom date range inputs work
Clear Filters button resets all filters and shows empty message
Summary section shows: total teachers, required hours, executed hours, difference
Teacher cards show: name, ID, completion rate, weekly hours, required, executed, difference
GET /api/courses returns all courses with correct structure
GET /api/departments returns all departments
GET /api/teachers returns all teachers
GET /api/reports/teacher-workload returns workload data
GET /api/reports/teacher-workload with date params filters correctly
All endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
